Our Philosophy

Mental
Performance
Is Trainable

The Power Enhancement Center provides comprehensive sport psychology and mental performance services. We believe that with the right structure, support, and system, athletes can unlock their full potential and sustain high-level performance over time.

Grounded in evidence-based psychological principles, our interventions extend beyond sport — developing transferable skills in discipline, emotional regulation, focus, and resilience that support success in school, career, relationships, and daily life.

Signature System
The POWER Program
P
Planning
Purposeful preparation and goal-setting for optimal performance
O
Organizing the Process
Building structured systems and routines for consistent excellence
W
Working the Process with a Winning Mentality
Executing with elite focus, competitive drive, and a championship mindset
E
Effort
Unwavering commitment, relentless work ethic, and consistent drive
R
Responsibility
Owning your actions, your results, and your growth every day
The Experts

Meet
Our Team

Licensed Clinical Psychologist · Owner · Supervisor
Dr. Rob Seifer

Robert Seifer is a Licensed Psychologist with expertise in psychological performance enhancement. He currently serves as Team Clinician for the Miami Dolphins and Sport Psychologist for the San Francisco Giants. Previously, he held roles with the Chicago White Sox (2020–2026), Miami Marlins (2011–2019), and University of Miami (2012–2017).

Dr. Seifer developed the POWER Program — a comprehensive, research-based mental skills system implemented with athletes across the NFL, MLB, NBA, MLS, professional tennis and golf, Olympic sport, collegiate athletics, and youth development programs.

He is an Associate Professor at Nova Southeastern University's College of Psychology and earned his PhD in Clinical Psychology at NSU in 2002.

Post-Doctoral Resident
Dr. Marissa Bazzano

Marissa Bazzano is a Postdoctoral Resident who has trained under Dr. Rob Seifer for six years in clinical psychology and sport psychology. She has extensive experience with athletes at the collegiate, high school, and youth levels, with a professional focus on integrating psychological performance enhancement with overall mental health and well-being.

She currently provides sport psychology and performance enhancement services with the University of Miami Tennis Department. Dr. Bazzano serves as Assistant Director of the Performance Enhancement Clinic and is an Adjunct Faculty Member in NSU's Department of Psychology and Neuroscience.

She earned her PsyD in Clinical Psychology at NSU in 2025.

What We Offer

Comprehensive
Services for Elite
Performance

01
Individual Performance Consultation

Personalized one-on-one sessions targeting mental performance, confidence, and mindset development.

  • Custom mental skills development
  • Pre-competition routine building
  • Performance planning & goal setting
  • Injury recovery & return-to-play support
  • Career transition counseling
02
Team & Coach Consultation

Integrating mental performance into team culture for sustained collective excellence.

  • Team cohesion development
  • Leadership skills training
  • Communication & accountability
  • Coach mental performance education
  • Culture & identity building
03
Workshops & Seminars

Structured group programs tailored to athletes, teams, and organizations at every level.

  • Goal setting & performance planning
  • Stress management techniques
  • Sleep & recovery optimization
  • Leadership development
  • Decision making under pressure
